text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer is here, along with the opportunity for
significant growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder appears unbothered by the
looming Japan Cup, but I know she's burning with
determination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll put that fervor to use and make the most of
the summer camp!
